languages.text: "Меровское отребье. Благодарю за бдительность, {name}". {n}Со свистом выдохнув сквозь зубы, капитан прикасается к {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}вокс-бусине{/g}.{/n} "Нет, отбой тревоги. Ситуация под контролем. Ликвидировал дезертира".

traits.locale_text: "Меровское отребье. Благодарю за бдительность, {name}". {n}Со свистом выдохнув сквозь зубы, капитан прикасается к {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}вокс-бусине{/g}.{/n} "Нет, отбой тревоги. Ситуация под контролем. Ликвидировал дезертира".
traits.speaker: IzimondSauerback

languages.text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."
languages.original_text: "Меровское отребье. Благодарю за бдительность, {name}". {n}Со свистом выдохнув сквозь зубы, капитан прикасается к {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}вокс-бусине{/g}.{/n} "Нет, отбой тревоги. Ситуация под контролем. Ликвидировал дезертира".

traits.locale_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."
"Merovian scum." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his comm-bead.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."
"Merovian scum." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his comm-bead.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

"Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

languages.text: 「メロヴィアンのゴミ。警戒ありがとう、{name}。」{n}歯を食いしばって息を吐き出す船長は、{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通信玉{/g}を触る。{/n}「いい、警報を解除する。状況は収まっている。逃亡者は排除された。」
languages.original_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィアンのゴミ。警戒ありがとう、{name}。」{n}歯を食いしばって息を吐き出す船長は、{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通信玉{/g}を触る。{/n}「いい、警報を解除する。状況は収まっている。逃亡者は排除された。」

languages.text: “梅罗夫的人渣。感谢你的警惕，{name}。”{n}上尉从牙缝里咝地吐出一口气，按了一下{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通讯珠{/g}。{/n}“不，取消警报。局面已控制。逃兵已被清除。”
languages.original_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

traits.locale_text: “梅罗夫的人渣。感谢你的警惕，{name}。”{n}上尉从牙缝里咝地吐出一口气，按了一下{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}通讯珠{/g}。{/n}“不，取消警报。局面已控制。逃兵已被清除。”

languages.text: "Merovlu pislik. Uyanıklığınız için teşekkürler." {n}Dişlerinin arasından tıslayarak nefes veren yüzbaşı, {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}mikro telsizine{/g} dokunuyor.{/n} "Hayır, alarmı iptal edin. Durum kontrol altında. Asker kaçağı ortadan kaldırıldı."
languages.original_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

traits.locale_text: "Merovlu pislik. Uyanıklığınız için teşekkürler." {n}Dişlerinin arasından tıslayarak nefes veren yüzbaşı, {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}mikro telsizine{/g} dokunuyor.{/n} "Hayır, alarmı iptal edin. Durum kontrol altında. Asker kaçağı ortadan kaldırıldı."

languages.text: «Chusma meroviana. Gracias por ser tan observador{mf||a}, {name}». {n}Siseando entre dientes, el capitán toca su {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}cuenta de comunicaciones{/g}.{/n} «No, cancelen la alarma. La situación está controlada. El desertor ha sido eliminado».
languages.original_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

traits.locale_text: «Chusma meroviana. Gracias por ser tan observador{mf||a}, {name}». {n}Siseando entre dientes, el capitán toca su {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}cuenta de comunicaciones{/g}.{/n} «No, cancelen la alarma. La situación está controlada. El desertor ha sido eliminado».

languages.text: « Ordure merovienne. Merci pour votre vigilance, {name}. » {n}Le capitaine soupire entre ses dents et touche son {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}communicateur{/g}.{/n} « Non, annulez l'alerte. Tout est sous contrôle. Le déserteur a été éliminé. »
languages.original_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

traits.locale_text: « Ordure merovienne. Merci pour votre vigilance, {name}. » {n}Le capitaine soupire entre ses dents et touche son {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}communicateur{/g}.{/n} « Non, annulez l'alerte. Tout est sous contrôle. Le déserteur a été éliminé. »

languages.text: "Merovianerabschaum. Danke für Eure Wachsamkeit, {name}." {n}Der Captain atmet durch zusammengebissene Zähne zischend aus und berührt seinen {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Voxstecker{/g}.{/n} "Nein, widerruft den Alarm. Die Situation ist unter Kontrolle. Der Deserteur wurde eliminiert."
languages.original_text: "Merovian scum. Thank you for your vigilance, {name}." {n}With a hissed exhale through his teeth, the captain touches his {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}comm-bead{/g}.{/n} "No, cancel the alarm. The situation is under control. The deserter has been eliminated."

traits.locale_text: "Merovianerabschaum. Danke für Eure Wachsamkeit, {name}." {n}Der Captain atmet durch zusammengebissene Zähne zischend aus und berührt seinen {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Voxstecker{/g}.{/n} "Nein, widerruft den Alarm. Die Situation ist unter Kontrolle. Der Deserteur wurde eliminiert."
